name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
       /\ states[i] = THINKING
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
       /\ forks' = forks
    \/ (* Philosopher i starts eating if both forks are free *)
       /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
       /\ forks[i] = 0
       /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
    \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
       /\ states[i] = EATING
       /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
       /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]

(* Temporal specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K
VARIABLES q, head, tail, full, empty, x

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

Producer == /\ full = FALSE
           /\ q' = Append(q, x)
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \div K
           /\ full' = (tail' = head)
           /\ empty' = FALSE
           /\ head' = head
           /\ x' = x

Consumer == /\ empty = FALSE
           /\ x' = Head(q)
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = (head + 1) \div K
           /\ empty' = (head' = tail)
           /\ full' = FALSE
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, full, empty>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = {}
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == 
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = {currentTerm'}
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Leader"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, FiniteSet
VARIABLES receivedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ receivedChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 

            [chunk \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> i * CHUNK_SIZE + chunk - 1]

            [chunk \in 1..(FILE_SIZE - (i - 1) * CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 
                (i - 1) * CHUNK_SIZE + chunk]
    ]
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ receivedChunks = {}

Next ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) : 
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks : 
        /\ i \notin receivedChunks
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN : 
            /\ loss
            /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
            /\ retransmitCount' <= MAX_RETRIES
        /\ \E loss \in BOOLEAN : 
            /\ \Not loss
            /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks \cup {i}
            /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks : 
        /\ i \in receivedChunks
        /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks, receivedChunks>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ receivedChunks \in FiniteSet

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = 1
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants = 1
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = 0
        \/ /\ turn = 0
          /\ wants = 1
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = 1
        \/ /\ turn = 1
          /\ wants = 0
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]
Next == /\ \A n \in Node : counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> IF m = n THEN counts[n][m] + 1 ELSE counts[n][m]]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
